description: skill-radar: refresh usage data at session start (no-op if the skill-radar CLI is not installed)

hooks.command: export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:$PATH"; if command -v skill-radar >/dev/null 2>&1; then skill-radar ingest >/dev/null 2>&1; skill-radar scan >/dev/null 2>&1; fi; echo '{"continue":true,"suppressOutput":true}'

export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:$PATH"; if command -v skill-radar >/dev/null 2>&1; then skill-radar ingest --hook >/dev/null 2>&1; fi; echo '{"continue":true,"suppressOutput":true}'
